name_en: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs
description: Harvard Kennedy School's flagship research center on international security, nuclear policy, and science diplomacy. Has hosted Iranian diaspora scholars and, at various points, regime-adjacent figures including [Kayhan Barzegar](/people/kayhan-barzegar) on visiting fellowships, making it a node in Iranian attempts to conduct Track II and academic diplomacy with Western institutions.

sources.title: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs
